MTVR-2491.narrative: Quarterly PMCS. Hub temp slightly elevated rear right; greased; within tolerance.
Driver complains of intermittent rumble at 25-40 mph from rear right corner. No vibration at low speed.
Quarterly PMCS. Vibration noted on rear right hub. Mechanic recommended monitor; no maintenance action taken — mission tempo prevented teardown.
VTC convoy SAN MATEO->BLOUNT ISLAND. 412 mi. No mid-mission faults but driver re-reported rumble.
Rumble now constant >15 mph. Tactical movement to MCB CamPen. Vehicle returned for evaluation.
Vibration sensor on hub passed amber threshold during yard test. Telemetry forwarded to FORGE.

JLTV-1107.narrative: Semi-annual. All hubs nominal. New vehicle, low hours.
Cold start moan front left, dissipates within 1 mile. Likely brake; no further investigation.
Quarterly PMCS. All hubs within spec. Greased per LO.

LAV-25-0892.narrative: Returned from 50-level overhaul at MDMC Barstow. New axle 1, axle 2 hub bearings refurbished (not replaced).
High-pitched whine axle 2 right at sustained road speed >35 mph.
Quarterly PMCS. Mechanic noted whine still present, recommended hub inspection at next 1000 hr mark.
Mid-mission grease pumped to axle 2 right hub. Whine reduced but did not eliminate.
Vibration sensor crossed yellow threshold. Crew re-tasked to FORGE evaluation queue.
